flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Cheyney University of Pennsylvania are 32% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($37.8k vs $55.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cheyney University of Pennsylvania fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (29.2% → 23.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cheyney University of Pennsylvania rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.7k → $15.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 15 pp at Cheyney University of Pennsylvania vs the 2003–2007 baseline (16.2% vs 30.8%).
